title: pi-imps configuration
description: Global configuration for pi-imps. Place at ~/.pi/agent/imps.json.

turnLimit.description: Max turns before an imp is cut off. Acts as a circuit breaker for runaway imps.

toolAllowlist.description: Default tool allowlist for all imps. Omit to allow all tools. Agent frontmatter `tools` overrides this per-agent.

additionalExtensions.description: Extensions that always load on imp sessions regardless of tool filtering. Agent frontmatter cannot override this.
